reviews.comment:
El domingo 3/12/2023 a la madrugada(1/2am) tardaron 1 hora en cargarme nafta literalmente. Un pibe solo había y era muy lento, sin ganas de trabajar claramente. Fui varias veces de día y los pibes de la tarde laburan muchísimo más rápido y con el doble de demanda.

(Translated by Google)
On Sunday, December 3, 2023, in the early morning (1:30 AM), it literally took them an hour to fill up my tank. There was only one guy working there, and he was very slow, clearly not wanting to work. I went several times during the day, and the guys who work in the afternoon are much faster and have twice the demand.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Matias lamentamos lo sucedido, vamos a tener en cuenta tu comentario para mejorar nuestro servicio. Te esperamos nuevamente para revertir la mala experiencia. Saludos
